creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Forgot to mention.

I fixed the DISTVERSION/DISTNAME gymnastics to properly work with USE_GUTHUB.

Used PLIST_FILES in place of external plist, since it installs just two files.

Applied minor whitespace fixes.

I'd suggest you to use portlint (available from the ports-mgmt/portlint port) to check new ports and updates, it catches these kind of formal problems.
